message:
fix(kalman): resolve E0502 borrow conflict in check_health and clippy pass-by-ref

- Inline count_status match in check_health() to avoid &mut self borrow
  conflict with &self.trackers immutable borrow in the for loop
- Change count_status() to take HealthStatus by value (trivially Copy)
  instead of by reference (clippy::trivially_copy_pass_by_ref)

[ft-3kxe.19]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
